history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hoodie with a green graphic and oversized black jeans with white stitching stands on an escalator. The person is obscuring their face with their hand, which is held up in front of their eyes, forming a "V" shape with their fingers. The background features a modern building with a curved glass facade and a canopy. Lush green plants, including palm trees and ferns, surround the escalator and the building. The lighting is bright and natural, casting shadows on the escalator steps. The overall mood is casual and urban, with a hint of mystery due to the obscured face. The color palette is dominated by black, white, green, and the neutral tones of the building and pavement.
